sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48820" key="qhsauristh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θησαυρ-ιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n48820.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who lays up in store</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:115" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.115</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
